problem id: 6564df54
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(6)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  00001100 -> 01000000
  11100100 -> 00000010
  01001011 -> 00010000
  00010010 -> 00000000
  10100010 -> 00000010
  10010101 -> 00001000
  10010001 -> 00001000
  00111010 -> 10000000
  10111011 -> 10011010
  10100001 -> 00001010

query: 10110100
predicted answer: 00000010
